items.title: Conversation practice
items.body: Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Você bebe leite Você come carne
options: You drink milk You eat meat
You drink milk You drink mdrink
meat eat You milk drink You
I drink milk You eat meat

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu bebo café e leite Eu como pão e presunto
options: I drink coffee and milk I drink bread and ham
ham and bread eat I milk and coffee drink I
You drink coffee and milk I eat bread and ham
I drink coffee and milk I eat bread and ham

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu bebo água e suco Eu como pão e queijo
options: You drink water and juice I eat bread and cheese
I drink water and juice I drink bread and cheese
cheese and bread eat I juice and water drink I
I drink water and juice I eat bread and cheese

items.text: I drink water I eat bread
